annotations.summary: No successful FluxTube backup in the last 7 days.
annotations.description: The dashboard Worker's nightly cron (default `15 4 * * *` UTC) hasn't recorded a successful backup in the 7-day evaluation window. Check the /dashboard/backup page for the last-attempted timestamp, tail the worker logs (`wrangler tail --name fluxtube-{{ $labels.instance_id }}-dashboard`), and verify the BACKUPS R2 binding is intact via `wrangler r2 object list fluxtube-{{ $labels.instance_id }}-backups`. `noDataState: OK` avoids false alarms during the Phase 9 cutover window when the dashboard Worker's OTLP emission is being wired; flip to `Alerting` once backup metrics are confirmed flowing so a full metric-shipping outage also fires this.
